nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2039; const int b = 2107; const int c = 2126; const int d = 2139; const int e = 2151; const int f = 2161; const int g = 2171; const int h = 2180; const int i = 2189; const int j = 2198; const int k = 2207; const int l = 2218; const int m = 2229; const int n = 2243; const int o = 2261; const int p = 2330;
